name: Crestron ISC Server
info:
# Crestron ISC
Symphony Interactive

---


## Crestron Configuration

Add a TCP server to program and an ISC symbol. Connect TX/RX respectively. Add analog signal joins to ISC as necessary.

Number of analog/serial joins on output side and input side must match.

Use aforce or sforce symbols to force signals to serial or analog if necessary.

---


## Node Parameters

**IPaddress:**  address of Crestron processor
**PORT:**  a  port for the server, as configured on the TCP server node in Crestron above.
**ISCoffset:**  this must match the total number of serial and/or analog joins added to symbol, default is 1.

---


## Input/Output message format

**msg.**
 - **topic** = analog, digital (0-100), or serial
 - **channel** = ISC join number
 - **payload** = value to send. digital and analog values are numbers, serial values are strings

func:
let Notes=[
    "A",
    "A#",
    "B",
    "C",
    "C#",
    "D",
    "D#",
    "E",
    "F",
    "F#",
    "G",
    "G#"
]
let octave = msg.payload/12
let note=Notes[msg.payload % 12]+parseInt(octave)
let msg2={payload:note};
msg.payload=Math.round(110*Math.pow(2,msg.payload/12) * 100) / 100
return ([msg,msg2]);

Crestron Nodes
func:
/* listbox notes...
payloadarray
Array of objects containing following properties:
title - title of the item,
description - description of the item. Optional if line type is Single-line or action type is menu,
menu - list of menu items (optional),
icon - URL of icon (optional),
icon_name - font icon name (optional).
icon_unicode - alternative to icon name - uses text characters (optional).
isChecked - boolean, set the item checked or on (optional).
*/

let nodes = global.get("nodes","file") || []
let dashlist=[]
for (let i=0;i<nodes.length;i++){
    dashlist.push({
        "title":nodes[i].node,
        "description":"Index: "+(i+1),
        "icon_name":"fa-share-alt",
        "isChecked":nodes[i].isChecked
    })
}

msg.payload=dashlist
return msg

Mutually exclusive selection
Presets
func:
/* listbox notes...
payloadarray
Array of objects containing following properties:
title - title of the item,
description - description of the item. Optional if line type is Single-line or action type is menu,
menu - list of menu items (optional),
icon - URL of icon (optional),
icon_name - font icon name (optional).
icon_unicode - alternative to icon name - uses text characters (optional).
isChecked - boolean, set the item checked or on (optional).
*/

let presets = global.get("presets","file") || []
let dashlist=[]
for (let i=0;i<presets.length;i++){
    dashlist.push({
        "title": i.toString().padStart(2, '0')+": "+presets[i].name,
        "isChecked":presets[i].isChecked
    })
    let nd={
        "payload": presets[i].name,
        "channel": i + 41,
        "topic":"serial"
    }
    node.send([null,nd]);
}
msg.payload=dashlist
return msg
